title: chylismia claviformis subsp. cruciformis
intro: Chylismia claviformis subsp. cruciformis, commonly known as the Desert Gold Poppy or Moon Poppies, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Chylismia claviformis subsp. cruciformis include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
